    U

    U1Group - Class in org.episteme.core.mathematics.algebra.groups
    Represents the Unitary Group U(1).
    U235_ENERGY_MEV - Static variable in class org.episteme.natural.physics.nuclear.FissionFusion
    Energy released per U-235 fission event.
    U235_FISSION - Static variable in class org.episteme.natural.physics.nuclear.CrossSection

    U238_CAPTURE - Static variable in class org.episteme.natural.physics.nuclear.CrossSection

    udhr() - Static method in class org.episteme.social.law.InternationalTreatyModel
    Returns a model representing the Universal Declaration of Human Rights.
    UI - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.LojbanConstants
     
    UK_ORDNANCE_SURVEY_CASSINI - Static variable in class org.episteme.natural.earth.coordinates.CoordinateConverter
    Parameters for the Cassini-Soldner projection used by the UK Ordnance Survey (e.g., for the Great Britain National Grid).
    UK_OS_CASSINI - Static variable in class org.episteme.natural.earth.coordinates.HistoricalGeodeticModels
    Parameters for the Cassini-Soldner projection used by the UK Ordnance Survey during the 19th and early 20th century.

    Constant for extra high level.

    Constant for rise.

    Constant for extra low level.

    Constant for advanced tongue root.
    UNICODE0319 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for retracted tongue root.
    UNICODE031A - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for no audible release.
    UNICODE031C - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for less rounded.
    UNICODE031D - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for raised.

    UNICODE0330 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for creaky voiced.
    UNICODE0334 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for velarized or pharyngealized.
    UNICODE0339 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for more rounded.
    UNICODE033A - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes

    UNICODE03B2 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Voiced fricative bilabial (greek small letter beta).
    UNICODE03B8 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Voiceless fricative dental (greek small letter theta).
    UNICODE03BB - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for extra IPA character.
    UNICODE03C7 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for voiceless fricative uvular.
    UNICODE2016 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes

    UNICODE2019 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for ejective.
    UNICODE203F - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes

    UNICODE207F - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for nasal release.

    UNICODE2198 - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.linguistics.IPACodes
    Constant for global fall.

    Update the simulation by one step.
    update(boolean, double, double) - Method in class org.episteme.natural.ui.viewers.physics.astronomy.ObjectGalaxySimulator

    update(double[]) - Method in class org.episteme.core.mathematics.statistics.timeseries.KalmanFilter
    Update step (measurement update). y = z - H * x (innovation) S = H * P * H^T + R (innovation covariance) K = P * H^T * S^-1 (Kalman gain) x = x + K * y P = (I - K*H) * P
    update(long, Money, TimeCoordinate) - Method in class org.episteme.social.economics.money.Quote
    Updates the quote with new trading data.
    update(SpinValve, double) - Method in class org.episteme.apps.apps.physics.spintronics.Spintronic3DRenderer
     
    update(Tensor, Tensor) - Method in interface org.episteme.core.mathematics.ml.neural.optimizers.Optimizer
    Updates the improved parameters based on gradients.
    update(Real, Real) - Method in class org.episteme.apps.apps.physics.spintronics.StochasticMTJ
    Updates the p-bit state based on input current.
    update(Real, Real) - Method in class org.episteme.natural.biology.neuroscience.SpikingNeuron
    Updates neuron state. dV/dt = (-(V - Vrest) + R*I) / tau
    update(Quantity) - Method in class org.episteme.social.architecture.traffic.TrafficSimulator
    Updates the simulation by a fixed time step.
    updateBest(double) - Method in class org.episteme.core.mathematics.optimization.swarm.Particle

    UrbanEvolutionEngine - Class in org.episteme.social.architecture
    Historical simulation engine that models the architectural and demographic evolution of a city over centuries.
    UrbanEvolutionEngine.ArchitecturalStyle - Enum Class in org.episteme.social.architecture
    Major architectural styles and their defining characteristics.
    UrbanEvolutionEngine.Building - Record Class in org.episteme.social.architecture
    Represents a single notable building within the city.
    UrbanEvolutionEngine.BuildingType - Enum Class in org.episteme.social.architecture
    Functional classes for building simulation.
    UrbanEvolutionEngine.CityParameters - Record Class in org.episteme.social.architecture
    Controls the simulation dynamics.
    UrbanEvolutionEngine.CityState - Record Class in org.episteme.social.architecture
    Snapshots the complete state of a city at a specific moment in history.
    UrbanEvolutionEngine.HistoricalPeriod - Enum Class in org.episteme.social.architecture
    Defined historical periods for urban categorization.
    UrbanHeatIslandModel - Class in org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism
    Analytical model for the Urban Heat Island (UHI) effect.
    UrbanHeatIslandModel(String) - Constructor for class org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism.UrbanHeatIslandModel
     
    UrbanHeatIslandModel.LandCover - Enum Class in org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism
    Categories of urban land cover with their associated thermal properties.
    UrbanHeatIslandModel.UrbanZone - Record Class in org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism
    Represents a discrete urban zone with specific surface and geometric characteristics.
    UrbanSprawlModel - Class in org.episteme.social.architecture.urbanism
    Analytical tool for modeling urban sprawl and land-use expansion dynamics.

    Creates an instance of a UrbanZone record class.
